meta.note: Thematic curriculum v3: concepts clustered by theme/sub-topic/dependency (course modules), sequenced foundational-first — NOT by source-document order or even division. One part per day, self-paced, score-gated. `topics` is the teaching order; the Day Quiz asks one question per topic in the same order.

parts.title: What AI Actually Is
parts.theme: The absolute basics: pattern-matching machines, weights, and the training/inference split.

parts.title: Inside the LLM: Transformers, Attention & Tokens
parts.theme: How language models are built and how they read text — plus the MoE twist on the architecture.

parts.title: Running Models Locally: Ollama, GPUs & Quantization
parts.theme: Everything about executing a model on your own hardware and making it fit.

parts.title: Training, Alignment & Reasoning Models
parts.theme: How models are improved after pretraining: RLHF to DPO, adapters, and trained-in reasoning.

parts.title: Embeddings & Vector Space
parts.theme: Meaning as coordinates: embedding models, similarity math, and 2026 embedding economics.

parts.title: Vision & Multimodal AI
parts.theme: Models that see: CLIP's shared space, LLaVA's descriptions, and the image ingestion pipeline.

parts.title: RAG Fundamentals & Chunking
parts.theme: Giving models external knowledge, and the art of splitting documents well.

parts.title: Vector Databases & ANN Indexes
parts.theme: Where vectors live and how nearest-neighbour search stays fast — LanceDB to pgvector.

parts.title: Keyword Search & Indexing
parts.theme: The classical side: inverted indexes, TF-IDF/BM25, FTS — and its learned-sparse successor.

parts.title: Advanced Retrieval Strategies
parts.theme: Getting the RIGHT chunks: hybrid fusion, query expansion, diversity, and targeted corrections.

parts.title: Re-ranking & the Retrieval Quality Stack
parts.theme: Two-stage precision: cross-encoders, late interaction, and the 7-layer quality recipe.

parts.title: Caching & Memory Systems
parts.theme: Remembering expensive work: semantic caches, staleness, memory hierarchies, prompt caching.

parts.title: Document & Text Processing
parts.theme: Turning messy PDFs and web pages into clean, retrievable chunks.

parts.title: Parallelism & Memory Management
parts.theme: Threads vs processes vs GPU, the GIL, and keeping RAM constant on huge inputs.

parts.title: LLM Serving & Inference Optimization
parts.theme: 2026 serving internals: KV cache, paging, kernels, speculation, continuous batching.

parts.title: Software Architecture & API Design
parts.theme: Modules with one job, and interfaces other software can trust.

parts.title: Data Schemas & the Python Tooling Stack
parts.theme: Filing systems that match your queries, plus the frameworks gluing the project together.

parts.title: Error Handling & Resilience
parts.theme: Degrade gracefully, default defensively, never fail silently — on any hardware.

parts.title: Testing, Accuracy & Optimisation
parts.theme: Measure before you claim: keyword-assertion suites, auditing tests, correct-then-fast.

parts.title: Agents & Tool Use
parts.theme: LLMs that act: the ReAct loop, skill design, sandboxing, and 2026 tool standards.

parts.title: Prompt Engineering & Agent Safety
parts.theme: Instructing agents precisely — and containing them when users try to hijack the prompt.

parts.title: Agentic RAG & Orchestration
parts.theme: Retrieval as a decision, control flow across layers, and the 2026 agent-framework landscape.

parts.title: Observability & Evaluation
parts.theme: Seeing inside the system and proving answers are grounded: monitors, logs, RAGAS, judges.
